title: Old Dream Story ☆ Cute Cat
description: A kit of cute cat textures that have changed the recipe book
body:
This is a resource pack that changes the recipe book's texture, making it extremely cute. When you click on it, it will display little emotes.  
If you have the Numismatic Overhaul mod installed, the wallet will also have corresponding changes.![Cute Cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/452fd0c06c539538aa787b919e7a9423b202fb33.jpeg)
